overview.description: The Vanguard Total Corporate Bond ETF (VTC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index designed to provide exposure to investment-grade US corporate bonds with broad maturities. VTC was launched on Nov 7, 2017 and is issued by Vanguard.
